allow: Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname=''timescaledb'';")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U agentexchange -d agentexchange -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname=''timescaledb'';")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U postgres -d trading_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as trade_count FROM trades;")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U postgres -d trading_db -c "\\dt")

Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U agentexchange -d agentexchange -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as trade_count FROM trades; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as position_count FROM positions; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as balance_count FROM balances WHERE asset != ''USDT'';")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U agentexchange -d agentexchange -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as trade_count FROM trades;")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U agentexchange -d agentexchange -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM positions;")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-api-1 sh -c "cd /app && python scripts/backfill_positions.py")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-timescaledb-1 psql -U agentexchange -d agentexchange -c "SELECT symbol, quantity, avg_entry_price, total_cost, realized_pnl FROM positions ORDER BY symbol;")
Bash(docker exec aitradingagent-api-1 sh -c "curl -s http://localhost:8000/health 2>/dev/null || sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:8000/health 2>/dev/null")
